privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real-world model of the EPFL Rocket Team's 2020 'Bella Lui' rocket (configured with an AeroTech K828FJ motor for its Kaltbrunn flight). Internal Portuguese names (e.g., 'Foguete') indicate the file was adapted from the RocketPy trajectory validation dataset. The task requires configuring simulation parameters precisely to the instructions: wind speed of 8.0 m/s at 270°, rod azimuth of 90°, and an optimal rod tilt between 3° and 15°. Crucially, the setup script (setup_task.sh) contains a fatal bug: it attempts to parse the uncompressed XML EPFL_BellaLui_2020.ork file using Python's zipfile module, which will instantly fail and crash the environment initialization.
